title: Warrior's Moon
description: An add-on for Enhanced Celestials, adding a Moon that aids in fighting and combat for the night.
body:
During the Warrior's Moon event, you will feel rejuvinated, being granted with regeneration for the night. During a Super Warrior Moon, you will be granted with strength as well. Take out the mobs around your base with the added power!

All credit for Enhanced Celestials goes to the original author CorgiTaco.

Credit as well to Draconic Archer for making many other add-ons for Enhanced Celestials!
